Zhou Mingrui.visual_anchor: early 20s Chinese male, short black hair, dark brown eyes, wearing modern sleepwear
Zhou Mingrui.source_notes: Introduced himself as 'The Fool' and fully accepted his identity as Klein.

Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline; distinct scholarly air; temples show grotesque wound with burn marks in chapter opening scene
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s male, brown eyes that turn deep black during divination, holding a silver-inlaid black cane
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: knows ancient Feysac language and Hermes language; scholarly bearing; brass revolver kept on desk
Klein Moretti.accessories: silver vine-leaf pocket watch (father's heirloom, second-hand, frequently malfunctions); brass-cylinder revolver kept in desk drawer
Klein Moretti.faction: citizen of Loen Kingdom, Awwa County, City of Tingen; history graduate of Khoy University
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Chapter 3 explicitly describes Klein's silver vine-leaf pocket watch with a portrait of his father inside the cover, and a semi-regulated brass-cylinder revolver

Melissa Moretti.skin_tone: pale, slightly thin-faced but with lustrous skin
Melissa Moretti.hair_style: straight, reaching down to vest level
Melissa Moretti.primary_clothing: grayish-white long dress that had been mended several times, old veiled hat
Melissa Moretti.face_description: Thin, slightly pale face with lustrous skin that retains a youthful glow despite limited nutrition; brown eyes that carry sharp, piercing intelligence and frequent exasperation
Melissa Moretti.visual_anchor: teenage girl, pale thin face with lustrous skin and sharp brown eyes, black hair reaching to the vest, wearing a tattered inherited veil cap, plain Victorian working-class dress with a self-sewn book bag over her shoulder
Melissa Moretti.color_palette: faded blue, grey, white, soft brown
Melissa Moretti.distinguishing_features: Gifted mechanical aptitude — repaired a malfunctioning pocket watch that professional watchsmiths could not fully fix; deeply practical and emotionally reserved
Melissa Moretti.accessories: tattered veil cap (inherited from her late mother), self-sewn book bag for carrying school stationery
Melissa Moretti.faction: Tingen Technical School — Steam and Machinery department student
Melissa Moretti.source_notes: Chapter 3 explicitly states brown eyes, black hair to vest level, thin slightly pale face with lustrous skin, age 15 last July (now ~16), student at Tingen Technical School Steam & Machinery dept, wears mother's tattered veil cap, carries self-sewn book bag
Melissa Moretti.unique_identifier: tattered inherited veil cap and self-sewn school bag; brown eyes fixed in a habitual expression of calm exasperation toward her brothers

Benson Moretti.primary_clothing: Linen shirt, black coat, halved top hat
Benson Moretti.face_description: Resembles Klein but lacks the scholarly air, looks older than his actual age due to work stress.
Benson Moretti.visual_anchor: mid-20s male, pale skin, short black hair, wearing working class Victorian attire, showing signs of fatigue
Benson Moretti.distinguishing_features: literate, employed at an import and export company, resourceful and calculating — negotiated gas pipe installation to avoid debt
Benson Moretti.source_notes: Text states he 'worked for several years' and 'using the convenience of working at an import and export company, he purchased a brand new gas lamp which was nearly at cost price'

Lord of Storms.primary_clothing: robes woven from dark storm clouds and lightning
Lord of Storms.face_description: Stern, majestic face with a strong jawline, intense brow arch, and piercing eyes.
Lord of Storms.visual_anchor: ageless male, muscular build, wild dark blue hair, electric blue eyes, wearing robes of storm clouds and lightning
Lord of Storms.color_palette: storm black, dark blue, electric yellow, charcoal grey
Lord of Storms.faction: Church of the Lord of Storms
Lord of Storms.source_notes: Origin myth details provided by Dunn Smith.

Evernight Goddess.visual_anchor: ageless divine female, pale skin, long flowing black hair, wearing flowing dark robes
Evernight Goddess.distinguishing_features: Titles: Lady of Crimson, Mother of Concealment, Empress of Misfortune and Horror, Mistress of Repose and Silence. Symbolizes the Red Moon.
Evernight Goddess.source_notes: Titles and red moon symbolism explicitly stated in the text.

God of Steam and Machinery.primary_clothing: Victorian inventor attire with a leather apron over a formal suit
God of Steam and Machinery.face_description: Intelligent, calculating face with precise features and sharp, observant eyes.
God of Steam and Machinery.visual_anchor: ageless male, average build, neat grey hair, amber eyes, wearing a leather apron over a Victorian suit
God of Steam and Machinery.color_palette: brass yellow, steel grey, leather brown, coal black
God of Steam and Machinery.distinguishing_features: Originally known as the God of Craftsmanship; born in the Fourth Epoch.
God of Steam and Machinery.faction: Church of the God of Steam and Machinery
God of Steam and Machinery.source_notes: History and previous name provided in the discussion between Klein and Dunn.

Eternal Blazing Sun.primary_clothing: Radiant golden Victorian robes with sun-burst patterns and white lace
Eternal Blazing Sun.face_description: Perfectly symmetrical features with a glowing complexion and intense, radiating golden eyes.
Eternal Blazing Sun.visual_anchor: Eternal male deity, radiant golden skin and hair, golden eyes, wearing sun-patterned golden Victorian robes
Eternal Blazing Sun.color_palette: bright gold, brilliant white, saffron yellow
Eternal Blazing Sun.faction: Church of the Eternal Blazing Sun
Eternal Blazing Sun.source_notes: Deity mentioned in myth; appearance guessed based on title and name.

God of Knowledge and Wisdom.primary_clothing: Deep blue scholar's robes with silver trim and numerous scrolls hanging from the belt
God of Knowledge and Wisdom.face_description: Wise, wrinkled face with a high forehead and sharp, discerning eyes behind spectacles.
God of Knowledge and Wisdom.visual_anchor: Elderly male deity, long white hair and beard, deep blue robes, holding an ancient book or scroll
God of Knowledge and Wisdom.distinguishing_features: Radiates an aura of calm intelligence
God of Knowledge and Wisdom.source_notes: Deity mentioned in myth; appearance guessed based on domain.

Earth Mother.primary_clothing: Flowing emerald and brown gown decorated with floral patterns and wheat stalks
Earth Mother.face_description: Warm and maternal face with soft features and eyes the color of a lush forest.
Earth Mother.visual_anchor: Maternal female deity, olive skin, long wavy brown hair with flower crown, wearing emerald green gown
Earth Mother.color_palette: emerald green, earth brown, wheat gold
Earth Mother.source_notes: Deity mentioned as appearing in the 3rd Epoch; appearance guessed based on title.

God of Combat.primary_clothing: Heavy gunmetal gray plate armor over dark leather, scarlet cloak
God of Combat.face_description: Rugged, battle-scarred face with a square jaw and fierce, determined eyes.
God of Combat.visual_anchor: Powerful male deity in gunmetal plate armor, scarlet cloak, battle-scarred face with square jaw
God of Combat.color_palette: gunmetal gray, scarlet red, iron black
God of Combat.distinguishing_features: Numerous scars on face and arms
God of Combat.faction: Church of the God of Combat
God of Combat.source_notes: Deity mentioned as appearing in the 3rd Epoch; appearance guessed based on title.
